name: Raveena Tandon
profileSummary: Raveena Tandon is an Indian actress primarily known for her work in Hindi films. Considered as one of the leading actresses of the 1990s, Tandon is a recipient of several awards, including a National Film Award, two Filmfare Awards and a Filmfare OTT Award. In 2023, she was awarded the Padma Shri, the fourth highest Indian civilian honour.
